summary_one_line: ELF header e_machine field (2 bytes at offset 0x12) must equal EM_X86_64 (0x003e) to take the case EM_X86_64 switch arm

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 2-byte little-endian e_machine field at input offset 0x12-0x13 must hold 0x003e (62 = EM_X86_64). The switch on e_machine at elf.cc:782 dispatches the true arm only for this exact 16-bit value.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winning cmplog seed 2a25258f656af261 carries 3e 00 at offset 0x12-0x13 (little-endian 0x003e = EM_X86_64), and seed 80ff9a7dac09a5e8 carries 3e 00 at offset 0x13-0x14; both supply the exact comparand the switch tests for.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Naive loser seeds carry 00 at offset 0x12, never the 0x3e byte that the switch arm requires, so they fall through to the default arm and return false.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog intercepts the switch comparison via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp callbacks, logs the constant 0x3e operand into the CmpLogObserver buffer, and I2SRandReplace substitutes that exact byte into the input at the e_machine offset; naive has no CMP introspection and must hit 0x003e by blind havoc mutation, which it almost never does.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same 2-byte e_machine field at offset 0x12-0x13 must reach 0x003e (EM_X86_64), but value_profile approaches it through progressively closer operand values rather than a single substitution.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winning value_profile finds reach 3e 00 at the e_machine offset; the CMP_MAP records each input whose e_machine value lands in a closer Hamming-distance bucket to 0x3e, preserving stepping-stones that eventually match exactly.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Naive loser seeds hold 00 at offset 0x12 and have no CMP_MAP feedback, so no closer-to-0x3e intermediate is retained and the equality gate stays blocked (resolved 1/10 vs winner 10/10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile adds CMP_MAP buckets keyed by operand Hamming-distance for the switch comparison; an input whose e_machine value is closer to 0x3e than any seen before is preserved as a new corpus stepping-stone, giving a gradient toward the exact EM_X86_64 constant that naive's edge-only feedback lacks.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the case EM_X86_64 arm of a switch on e_machine.
The true side of line 787 (case EM_X86_64) is the globally blocked side.
Winning cmplog seed carries 3e 00 at the e_machine offset 0x12-0x13.
W bytes at offset 0x12 include 0x3e while L bytes there are dominated by 00.
Loser naive seed holds 00 at offset 0x12 and never the EM_X86_64 byte.
The loser takes the default arm and returns false at line 822/828.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 822  T=0 F=6  T=26 F=3  default:

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog intercepts CMP operands and I2SRandReplace substitutes the logged operand into the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S and only blind havoc/token mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile records a Hamming-distance CMP_MAP bucket and preserves inputs closer to matching as corpus.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile resolved the branch in all 10 trials versus naive's 1.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 57 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 2a25258f656af261` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 16 and 17 of the 18-level ancestor chain, direct lower-bound evidence of an I2SRandReplace find in the cmplog winner's lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on a 16-bit equality constant where cmplog does NOT resolve faster than naive, or where naive resolves the EM_X86_64 switch arm at the same 10/10 rate without any CMP-derived stepping-stone.

weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile gradient story rests on mechanism description only; no per-step CMP_MAP-bucket trace is shown for the value_profile winner, so the gradient-vs-lucky-havoc distinction for Pair 2 is inferred rather than directly observed.
